common.pageNotFound: The page you requested is not in the Expo shell yet.

home.reviewDraftDesc: Review and submit your pending reports to help your community.

map.unavailableDesc: This screen uses Expo Maps on iOS and Android. Open it in the native build to see the live pins.
map.seedDataNote: This is static seed data for the hackathon prototype. The real product will later hydrate from Google Maps data and moderation state.

onboarding.title: Report equality issues with
onboarding.description: Tahaqaq helps you document civic cases, attach trusted evidence, and keep every report clear from the very first step.

auth.otpDescription: We'll send a 6-digit code to your inbox, then you can finish sign in with the OTP.
auth.emailDescription: Enter the email tied to your account. We'll send the login code there.
auth.invalidCode: Invalid code. Check the digits and try again.
auth.codeExpired: Code expired. Request a new one.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Wait, then try again.

audit.title: Audit submission
audit.followFlow: Follow the six-step flow and keep every audit anonymous.
audit.allOptional: All categories are optional. Keep it short, honest, and anonymous.
audit.confirmSuggestion: Confirm the suggested establishment or pick another one.
audit.locationPermOff: Location permission is off, so you can confirm manually.
audit.searchPlaceholder: Search name, city, address, or category
audit.tapCategories: Tap every category that applies. You can skip this step if you only want to submit a quick note.
audit.keepItLight: Keep it light, precise, and anonymous.
audit.optionalSkip: This is optional — skip if you're done.
audit.commentPlaceholder: Add a short note about your experience
audit.doubleCheck: Double-check everything before you send it.
audit.noCategoriesSkipped: No categories selected — you skipped this step.
audit.anonymousDesc: We only keep the evidence signals, not your identity.
audit.thankYouMessage: Your audit helps improve public services.

about.step1Desc: Choose a facility to audit from the map.
about.step2Desc: Rate 5 categories: Cleanliness, Staff, Wait Time, Equipment, Overall.
about.step3Desc: Our AI checks photo authenticity and auto-blurs faces.
about.step4Desc: Hospital integrity scores update in real-time.
about.anonymousAuditsDesc: Audits are anonymous, and no personal data is linked to your submissions.
about.aiProcessingDesc: Photos are AI-processed and faces are auto-blurred to protect privacy.
about.noTrackingDesc: We do not track you, show ads, or sell your data to third parties.
about.purposeOfDataDesc: Data is used solely for hospital integrity scoring and transparency.
about.voluntarySubmissionsDesc: All submissions and ratings are voluntary and represent honest feedback.
about.limitationLiabilityDesc: TAHAQAQ is not liable for hospital actions, conditions, or responses.
about.abusePolicyDesc: Abusive, fraudulent, or harassing submissions will result in device blocking.
about.contentLicenseDesc: By uploading photos, you grant TAHAQAQ a license to verify and display them.

faq.q1Question: How do I report an issue?
faq.q1Answer: Navigate to the report screen from the home tab, fill in the details about the civic issue you've observed, attach photos or evidence, and submit. Your report will be sent to the relevant authorities.
faq.q2Answer: Yes, all reports are anonymous by default. Your identity is never shared with the public or the facility being reported. Only verified administrators can access reporter details for follow-up.
faq.q3Answer: Reports go through an automated verification process that includes photo authenticity checks, GPS location validation, and cross-referencing with existing reports. Our AI-assisted system helps ensure accuracy.
faq.q4Answer: You can edit your report within 24 hours of submission while it's still in draft or pending status. Once verified or resolved, edits are no longer available to maintain data integrity.

language.title: Language
language.restartRequired: Please restart the app to apply the new language and layout changes.
